revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-160

An incandescent lamp with a gas filling to which a certain proportion of a halogen has been added in order to minimise blackening of the envelope by returning evaporated tungsten to the filament.

It is usually characterised by exceptionally small size in relation to the high luminous intensities which can be obtained.


Note: The Tungsten-Iodine Lamp or Quartz-Iodine Lamp belongs to this category.

{{IALAFooter}}
